## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX teams to discuss SEO and content strategy progress, introduce new team members, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX content production is ramping up, with blog post clicks doubling in 3 weeks and LLM mentions increasing](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Abnormal seeks clearer tracking of progress towards initial SEO growth projections and keyword targets](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Content approval process to remain in place, with Emily Burns as main point of contact for Abnormal](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Teams to maintain high volume of weekly content publishing (15-20 pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Mara Leighton (GrowthX): Director with background in journalism, content marketing for B2B startups](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Mariana Montezzana (GrowthX): Experienced with SaaS platforms, technical audiences, and building content funnels](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Abdallah AlHakim (Abnormal): Digital marketing lead, joined in January and signed GrowthX as first vendor](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Emily Burns (Abnormal): Content team lead, 10 years experience, focuses on top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Content Performance Update

  - [Blog post clicks more than doubled in past 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [LLM mentions trending positively, with quick pickup of new content (e.g., Red Teamer blog post)](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [AI Glossary seeing decreased impressions but increased engaged sessions](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [New dashboard in development to consolidate SEO and LLM citation data](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### SEO Strategy Alignment

  - [Abdallah emphasized need to track progress against initial keyword cluster projections](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Jason to work with Marcel to revisit original traffic increase projections (e.g., 20x growth potential)](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Team to develop benchmarks and outcomes to share with broader Abnormal team](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [Current queue includes 38 approved topics, with Mariana adding 14 new ideas (10 more incoming)](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Emily to continue approving topics weekly to maintain sufficient backlog](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [GrowthX team to flag if topic queue runs low to avoid publishing gaps](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [Potential for GrowthX to access Abnormal's Asana board for visibility into upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Emily open to GrowthX input on SEO optimization for timely attack-related content](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Exploring process to add Mara and Mariana to Abnormal systems for easier collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to provide follow-up on keyword benchmarking and progress towards initial projections](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Emily to ensure weekly topic approvals to maintain robust content backlog](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Explore adding GrowthX team members to Abnormal's Asana board for content visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Consider in-person meeting when Abnormal team is in San Francisco for upcoming off-site](https://fathom.video/share/ypqyydaYn5CP1LYZSgf4ySsu82vrJgLW?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
